word: G1512 - εἴ περ - eí per - i per - If so be

sections.paragraph:
- Original: εἴπερ

- Transliteration: Ei per

- Phonetic: i per

- Definition:

1. if indeed, since, if after all

- Origin: from G1487 and G4007

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Conjunction

- Strong's: From G1487 and G4007; if perhaps: - if so be (that) seeing though.
